allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const code=fs.readFileSync\(''src/3d/core3d.js'',''utf8''\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\(''Syntax OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Syntax error:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const code=fs.readFileSync\(''src/3d/core3d.js'',''utf8''\).replace\(/^import.*$/gm,''//''\).replace\(/^export.*$/gm,''//''\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\(''Syntax OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''Error:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const html = fs.readFileSync\(''index.html'', ''utf8''\); let depth = 0; let maxDepth = 0; let line = 0; for \(const ch of html\) { if \(ch === ''\\n''\) line++; if \(ch === ''{''\) { depth++; if \(depth > maxDepth\) maxDepth = depth; } if \(ch === ''}''\) depth--; } console.log\(''Final depth:'', depth, ''Max depth:'', maxDepth, ''Lines:'', line\);")
